final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster (小红书 cover, 9:16 vertical) announcing that GPT-image-2 is now live on the Lovart platform, with a high-end editorial magazine aesthetic.

Style/medium: high-end editorial magazine cover, flat graphic design with bold typographic hierarchy, inspired by Wallpaper* and Vogue editorial layouts
Composition: diagonal composition — key visual elements and text blocks arranged along a strong diagonal axis from lower-left to upper-right, creating dynamic tension; portrait 9:16 frame
Subject: bold typographic announcement featuring verbatim text "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart" as the two dominant visual anchors, supported by a concise tagline implying the platform launch
Scene/backdrop: clean, minimal abstract background that reinforces the diagonal structure — geometric planes or sharp angular shapes along the diagonal
Lighting/mood: high-contrast, sharp and confident; no soft gradients; strong graphic punch with a premium editorial mood
Color palette: deep neutral base (near-black or off-white) with one high-contrast accent color (electric blue, vivid red, or acid yellow) used exclusively on the key text and diagonal accent elements to create maximum visual tension
Text (verbatim): "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart"
Constraints: text "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart" must be legible and prominent; diagonal layout must be clearly perceivable; no more than two accent colors; design must feel premium, not busy
Avoid: gradients as background wash, drop shadows, clipart icons, generic tech circuit textures, overcrowded layout, pastel tones, symmetrical centered composition
